evals.expected_output: Only a Markdown table with status, title, granted_at local time, and expires_at local time. No prose, tokens, cookies, IDs, or available_count.

evals.prompt: Check reset info again, same as before, table only.
evals.expected_output: Only the reset-credit Markdown table, with UTC timestamps converted to local time.

evals.prompt: Use local Codex credentials to check available reset credits. Do not print any token, cookie, or ID.
evals.expected_output: Only the reset-credit Markdown table, with no secrets or complete unique IDs.
